summary: Implement CalculateStats function that aggregates session data for dashboard display: tool call counts, time distribution percentages, peak step (slowest tool call), and total duration. Handles nil/empty sessions gracefully.
keyDecisions: PeakStep uses zero-value ToolCallSummary (not pointer) for empty sessions, matching the SessionStats struct definition
When multiple tools have the same peak duration, first encountered wins (stable iteration order)
Only EntryToolUse entries are counted; tool_result, thinking, and message entries are ignored
Percentages calculated from tool durations sum, not from session.Duration (session duration may include non-tool time)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: ToolCallCounts: accurate count per tool name (0 error margin)
ToolTimePcts: percentage (0-100) per tool, sum approx 100%
PeakStep: single slowest tool call (ToolCallSummary with name + duration)
Handles empty sessions gracefully (zero counts, nil PeakStep)
Unit tests: count accuracy, percentage calculation, empty sessions, single-tool sessions
